creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
wmti is the short name (that I made up) for a program
called "wmthemeinstall" (kinda weird name, isn't it?). i've
put a sed script in the port makefile to ensure that
windowmaker's global themes install is found by the program.

feel free to change the name of the port, put it in a
different ports category, etc. if you commit. thanks.

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the shar below to import the wmti port to the ports tree.
